summary: Complete testing of new upload features for Brazilian Electoral ERP Platform - All features working correctly: Receipt uploads to expenses/revenues/contracts, automatic expense generation from contracts with installments (parcelas), automatic payment status change to 'pago' when receipt is attached to expense.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - non-blocking, visual works correctly after render

passed_tests: Receipt upload to expense changes status to 'pago' (POST /api/expenses/{id}/attach-receipt)
Invalid file types rejected (only JPEG, PNG, PDF accepted)
Contract creation generates automatic expenses based on parcelas config
Contract expenses endpoint shows payment summary (total_paid, total_pending)
JPEG, PNG, PDF file types accepted
GIF and other file types rejected with 400 status
UI: Status column in Despesas page shows Pago/Pendente badges
UI: Upload receipt button visible for pending expenses
UI: Contract expenses dialog shows parcelas with paid/pending status
UI: Contract form has parcelas selector (1-4 installments)
UI: Generate expenses checkbox in contract form
seed_data_creation: Existing test data includes: 1 contract 'Contrato de Serviço Gráfico' with 2 parcelas (R$ 5.000 each) - Parcela 1/2 is 'Pago', Parcela 2/2 is 'Pendente'. Total contract value R$ 10.000.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new upload features working correctly. Key endpoints tested: POST /api/expenses/{id}/attach-receipt (changes status to pago), POST /api/revenues/{id}/attach-receipt, POST /api/contracts/{id}/attach, GET /api/contracts/{id}/expenses (shows payment summary). File types restricted to JPEG, PNG, PDF only. Contract expenses dialog accessible via $ icon on contract row.

features_verified.upload_comprovante_despesa_muda_status_p: ✅ WORKING - Status changes from 'pendente' to 'pago' when receipt attached
features_verified.criacao_contrato_gera_despesas_automatic: ✅ WORKING - Expenses generated based on num_parcelas config
features_verified.pagina_contratos_mostra_dialog_despesas: ✅ WORKING - Dialog shows parcelas with paid/pending status and summary
features_verified.coluna_status_na_pagina_despesas: ✅ WORKING - Status column shows Pago (green) / Pendente (amber) badges
features_verified.upload_comprovante_receitas: ✅ WORKING - Receipts can be attached to revenues
features_verified.validacao_tipos_arquivo: ✅ WORKING - Only JPEG, PNG, PDF accepted; other types rejected with 400
